violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager is no longer associated with this establishment. -Need documentation of current serve safe employee.
General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. -Witnessed no handwashing during inspection. Handwash sink is dry.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution between uses. -Multiple wet cloths sitting on counters . -Need to set up sanitizer buckets.--In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Ice scoops need to be stored with handle out of ice.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Inside top of big ice machine needs cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Center island carts that hold chiller machines need cleaned.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Handwash sink is blocked.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floor edges and floor drains need thorough cleaning.

General premises. — --Opening to outside or portion of building that is not part of the food establishment , was not protected against the entry of insects and rodents. -Sliding door open at all times. Back door propped open.
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Backflow prevention, back siphonage (3 pts deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
